<!-- indicator: fig-safe-health-need-improve -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-safe-health-need-improve
#| fig-cap: 'Safe and Healthy Communties Priorities that Need Improvement'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Safe and Healthy Communties Priorities that Need Improvement.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-safe-health-need-improve", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
